Smithing Chisel  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 0.7 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except CLR DRU MNK SHM BST BER
Race: ALL

2025 do not need to be able to wield it to use
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2025 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent
WhoWasThatMaskedMan
3 posts
as of Sept 2025 (Fangbreaker) you do not need to be able to wield it to use. as a gnome cleric was fully able to combine with small brick of acrylia in a forge to create small piece of acrylia

Waar
Scholar
41 posts
Blacksmith Gerta [Smithing Merchant] Does NOT sell this item.
▲ Page top
Blacksmith Gerta [Smithing Merchant]
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2023 at 11:42 PM Rating: Decent
flygirl1
Scholar
28 posts
She does sell it! You just have to make sure you uncheck the box "Show only items I can use". I would have saved myself a bunch of time if I had just scrolled a little bit further down the message board. :-P

Happy Smithing!!

Edited, Apr 3rd 2023 12:43am by flygirl1
▲ Page top
Can these be consumed or broken?
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2018 at 5:55 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
I just did a combine breaking down small brick of ore into small piece of ore and my smithing chisel went poof. It wasn't on the ground or in my inventory or in my weapon slot. I wouldn't be able to put in my weapon slot anyway, since I am wrong class to be able to wield it.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Can these be consumed or broken?
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2018 at 6:13 PM Rating: Good
Bobbybick
Guru
528 posts
animekenji wrote:
I just did a combine breaking down small brick of ore into small piece of ore and my smithing chisel went poof. It wasn't on the ground or in my inventory or in my weapon slot. I wouldn't be able to put in my weapon slot anyway, since I am wrong class to be able to wield it.

Currently (as of the 2-26-2018 patch) there is a known bug where return on success/failure tradeskill items are not being given back to players. I believe they have it fixed internally but until the next patch it is an ongoing issue.

NOTE FOR THE FUTURE: If you are reading this past April of 2018 this bug has likely been fixed by now.
▲ Page top
Can these be consumed or broken?
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2018 at 6:25 PM Rating: Decent
Arog
Scholar
196 posts
I have experienced this with doing tarnished weapons (sharpening stone plus rusty weapon). If you fail you are suppose to get your rusty weapon back and it eats the stone. But the last couple days it takes both the stone and the rusty weapon on fails.
▲ Page top
It IS there, even if you can't see it
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2014 at 11:41 PM Rating: Decent
gothicangel
15 posts
If you cannot find this at the vendors, make sure you uncheck the little box at the bottom of the vendor screen for items that you can't use. This is technically a weapon, so if you are not able to equip the weapon, it will not show up as available for you to purchase. It only took me like 2 hours of porting all over the world to figure this out!
▲ Page top
It IS there, even if you can't see it
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2014 at 10:08 AM Rating: Decent
Mjodvitnir
Scholar
23 posts
Thanks for this bit of insight, I was having the same issues.

found one

in POK Tallis Paerk sells em

▲ Page top
RE: Also sold in POK
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2003 at 6:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783487315
Scholar
106 posts
Confirmed Tallis Paerk at the above location sells them, he's the guy that sells the ore needed for skilling up in smithing so you probably know him too well already!

The sequence is a rip-off but...

block + chisel = 1 large (gip!)
large + chisel = 1 small (huh I'm wasting most of it!)
small + chisel = 2 pieces (better but...)

I don't know what the trivial on this is on the conversion, it was triv with smithing of 175 but even with wisdom of 260 I failed on 4 conversions out of 15.
▲ Page top
chisel
QuoteReply

14 posts

are there any around freeport

RE: chisel
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 5:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793289423
9 posts
North Freeport, near the forge. Kyrin Steelbone in the building next to the forge has thee for 1 plat, 4 gold 1 copper.
▲ Page top
Nothing new
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2002 at 8:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769823255
View User Forum
31 posts
These chisels have always been available from the same vendors that have the forging hammer mentioned above. There just wasn't much reason to include it in the item database until they decided to be really completist about it.

Note: By "always", I don't truly mean since EQ first went live. But certainly long before now, probably at least since sometime around Kunark release, given its use and the forging hammer's.

Edited, Wed Apr 3 20:01:23 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Nothing new
QuoteReply
# May 12 2002 at 6:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246364188
52 posts
As of the May 8th massive Tradeskill patch, these now *do* have a use - as mentioned below, they are used to convert larger sizes of ore to smaller.

Bricks from Blocks, Pieces from Small Bricks.
